title: GetResponse vs Flodesk (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare GetResponse and Flodesk email marketing tools. See pricing, features, and which fits your business needs.
intro: GetResponse and Flodesk are both popular email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. GetResponse is a comprehensive all-in-one marketing suite ideal for course creators and webinar hosts, while Flodesk specializes in visually stunning emails for creative professionals. Your choice depends on whether you need extensive marketing tools or prioritize beautiful email design.

comparison_table.tool_a: Webinars, courses, automation, landing pages, funnels
comparison_table.tool_b: Beautiful templates, flat pricing, workflows, checkout forms

comparison_table.tool_a: Course creators, webinar hosts, digital marketers

choose_a_if: You want a free tier or need the lowest starting price ($19/month)
You host webinars, create online courses, or use advanced automation
You need comprehensive marketing features like landing pages and funnels
You require extensive integrations and multi-channel marketing capabilities
You're looking for an all-in-one marketing platform
choose_b_if: Design and visual appeal are your top priorities for email campaigns
You want unlimited subscribers included at any price point
You prefer simple, predictable flat-rate pricing with no scaling costs
You're a designer, photographer, or visual brand
You need checkout forms and link-in-bio features for direct sales

faq.a: GetResponse is more feature-rich and versatile, making it better for marketers who need webinars, courses, and complex automation. However, Flodesk excels in email design and visual appeal, making it superior for creative professionals who prioritize stunning aesthetics. The better choice depends on your specific needs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, GetResponse or Flodesk?
faq.a: GetResponse is significantly cheaper, starting at $0 with a free tier or $19/month for paid plans. Flodesk's flat-rate model starts at $38/month with no free tier. However, Flodesk includes unlimited subscribers at all price points, while GetResponse's subscriber limits vary by plan.

faq.q: Can I switch from Flodesk to GetResponse?
faq.a: Yes, most email marketing platforms allow you to export your contact lists and migration is typically straightforward. Both platforms offer standard integrations and data export options. You may need to recreate your email templates and workflows in the new platform, but your subscriber data can be transferred.
